title: Sort — Selection Sort
description: Sort an array of n integers in non-decreasing order using selection sort (or any sort — the result is what matters).
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n integers.
outputSpec: The sorted array on one line, space-separated.

botCodes.code: let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let a=Array.init n(fun _->Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in Array.sort compare a;Array.iter(fun x->Printf.printf"%d " x) a;print_newline()
